summary: Tested iteration 158 features: Forensic appellate language, ground merging, contingent flag for ineffective_counsel, ground-type-specific confidence notes. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend loads correctly. Code review confirms all requested features are implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: legitimacy_engine.py correctly implements is_contingent flag for ineffective_counsel (line 187)
legitimacy_engine.py correctly caps ineffective_counsel at 'moderate' unless evidence_score >= 3 (lines 182-184)
_generate_confidence_note() correctly returns forensic framing: 'CONTINGENT' for ineffective_counsel, 'mens rea' for miscarriage_of_justice, 'proportionality' for sentencing_error

classify.py _merge_overlapping_grounds() correctly clusters jury issues under 'Procedural Unfairness (Jury Integrity)', psychiatric issues under 'Miscarriage of Justice: Failure to Properly Determine Mental State (Mens Rea)', sentencing issues under 'Sentencing Error: Disproportionate to True Culpability'
LegitimacyPanel.jsx correctly renders contingent warning badge with data-testid='contingent-warning' when is_contingent is true (lines 33-37)
GroundsOfMerit.jsx correctly uses whitespace-pre-line for description rendering (line 851)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 158 verified all barrister feedback features: (1) Forensic appellate language in confidence notes - ineffective_counsel shows 'CONTINGENT', miscarriage_of_justice references 'mens rea', sentencing_error references 'proportionality'. (2) Ground merging clusters related issues under single ground with sub-particulars. (3) is_contingent flag added to legitimacy_scores for ineffective_counsel. (4) Ineffective counsel capped at 'moderate' unless evidence_score >= 3. (5) LegitimacyPanel renders contingent warning badge. (6) GroundsOfMerit uses whitespace-pre-line for sub-particulars display. All backend logic tests pass. Frontend components have correct code. The Counsel Synthesis section is a prompt change for Barrister View reports - will only appear in newly generated reports.

is_contingent_flag.details: ineffective_counsel ground_type returns is_contingent: true in legitimacy_scores

details.ineffective_counsel: Contains 'CONTINGENT' - requires evidentiary support before advancement

details.psychiatric_mens_rea: Clusters psychiatric/mental issues under 'Miscarriage of Justice: Failure to Properly Determine Mental State (Mens Rea)'
details.jury_integrity: Clusters jury issues under 'Procedural Unfairness (Jury Integrity)'
details.sentencing: Clusters sentencing issues under 'Sentencing Error: Disproportionate to True Culpability'

contingent_warning_ui.details: LegitimacyPanel.jsx renders amber warning badge with data-testid='contingent-warning' when is_contingent is true

whitespace_pre_line.details: GroundsOfMerit.jsx uses whitespace-pre-line class for description to properly display sub-particulars
